channel.title: admin on Subeen Pang
channel.description: Recent content in admin on Subeen Pang

item.description: I am a graduate student of mechanical engineering at Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT). My research interests include computational imaging, mathematical optimization and machine learning for optics. I enjoy using mathematics as the language of physics; for instance, I had been interested in the role of the rigged Hilbert space in quantum mechanics. Before joining MIT, I majored in materials science and engineering at Seoul National University where I had studied computational chemistry, condensed matter physics, and electron microscopy.
